name: Brownfield Adoption Reference Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct owner-scoped Evidence that the fixed app/apk/relay reference uses ordinary Project Model, Change Kernel, and existing CLI boundaries without inferred completeness or Worker-read claims.

command: const proof = await import('./test/project-model/path-ownership.test.mjs'); if (proof.BROWNFIELD_ADOPTION_PROJECT_MODEL_PROOF_VERSION !== 1) throw new Error('The fixed Project Model brownfield adoption proof is not implemented.');

oracle.description: The fixed Project Model path-ownership module must export proof version 1 only after the materialized reference boundary and unknown-path attack exit zero.

rejects: relay, app, apk, governance, legacy, or unknown tracked paths without one exact owner or non-authorizing disposition
app or apk presented as governed instead of provisional independent Contract providers
legacy implementation presented as modeled or writable instead of opaque and explicitly ungoverned
a relay initial Context Capsule containing app, apk, or legacy implementation paths

residualUncertainty: The proof compiles declared initial Context scope; Worker materialization and filesystem read enforcement remain LGT-020 and LGT-021 concerns.

command: const proof = await import('./test/change-kernel/path-ownership.test.mjs'); if (proof.BROWNFIELD_ADOPTION_CHANGE_KERNEL_PROOF_VERSION !== 1) throw new Error('The fixed Change Kernel brownfield adoption proof is not implemented.');

oracle.description: The fixed Change Kernel path-ownership module must export proof version 1 only after a real relay-only create, compile, Minimum Gate, and accept lifecycle exits zero.

rejects: a brownfield-specific lifecycle, scope, Evidence, Closure, authority, or acceptance bypass
an Accepted Change Package that touches app, apk, legacy, ungoverned, or unassigned implementation paths
dependency implementation paths exposed as initial relay Context instead of exact Contract facts
open reference Knowledge Gaps omitted, closed, or rewritten by the relay Change

residualUncertainty: The proof uses one local single-writer reference repository and does not establish remote Worker or identity trust.

command: const proof = await import('./test/local-workbench/cli.test.mjs'); if (proof.BROWNFIELD_ADOPTION_LOCAL_WORKBENCH_PROOF_VERSION !== 1) throw new Error('The fixed Local Workbench brownfield inspection proof is not implemented.');

oracle.description: The fixed CLI module must export proof version 1 only after inspect --json preserves exact reference states, Claims, routes, and open Gaps without inferred completeness.

rejects: a special adoption command or browser onboarding requirement
loss or invention of governed, provisional, opaque, Contract, Gate-route, or open Knowledge Gap facts
an inferred completeness, score, percentage, confidence, health, readiness, or green-light conclusion
unbounded or non-canonical CLI Profile output

residualUncertainty: The proof exercises semantic JSON inspection rather than browser onboarding or pixel-perfect rendering.
